---
title: "Welcome"
---

Hi! This blog is a work in progress.


## [Prisons in Figures. Just How Much Trouble Are We In?](prisons.html)

![Derek Harper / *Wandsworth Prison* / [CC BY-SA 2.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/2.0/)](prison.jpg)

A visual look at the capacity of prisons in England and Wales. [found here](%22prisons.Rmd%22)
